hypothesis: A per-theme-cluster cross-source synthesis prompt over the reader-pack units catalog produces structured-citation claims (case_id + exact unit_id + verbatim quote) whose citations pass the mechanical crystal-lint gate at a high rate, enabling durable claims without bespoke scripts. Predicted: >=90% of emitted citations verbatim-grounded on the M24/M27 replay set (pilot observed 85/88 = 97%).
rollback: Revert the crystal-synth command + prompt; the durable store is append-only and gate-guarded, so no bad claim can persist. Remove prompt.crystal_synth from evolution/components.json.
